matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101011110 6
1 011000110 4
2 011111001 6
3 011111101 7
4 100000010 2
5 001110110 5
6 000101001 3
7 000000010 1

56 65 000000000 a
67 76 000000010 1 match 7
70 07 000100000 1

24 42 001011000 3
35 53 011000100 3
